source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析7》

segments.text: Welcome to our radio program 'Travel with Me in Australia'.
segments.translation: 欢迎收听我们的广播节目《与我畅游澳大利亚》。

segments.text: I'm Anna, the presenter of the radio show.
segments.translation: 我是这档广播节目的主持人安娜。

segments.text: In today's session, I will introduce a fantastic place to you - the Coconut Beach Resort, which was newly built and opened to the public several months ago.
segments.translation: 在今天的节目中，我要向大家介绍一个很棒的地方——椰子海滩度假村。它是新建的，几个月前才对外开放。

segments.text: I visited the resort last week and had a wonderful time there.
segments.translation: 我上周去过这家度假村，在那里度过了一段美好时光。

segments.text: Now I will give some details.
segments.translation: 现在我来介绍一些详细信息。

segments.text: First of all, who is the target group?
segments.translation: 首先，它的目标客群是谁呢？

segments.text: As it is a beach resort, it's not suitable for backpackers, of course.
segments.translation: 当然，因为它是一家海滩度假村，所以并不适合背包客。

segments.text: With little houses alongside the beach, this resort is the best place to spend time with your beloved one.
segments.translation: 这家度假村沿海滩建有一座座小屋，是与爱人共度时光的最佳去处。

segments.text: I know several newlyweds booked cabins there to spend their honeymoon.
segments.translation: 我知道有几对新婚夫妇预订了那里的小屋度蜜月。

segments.text: However, it isn't an ideal destination for families with several children because it may be beyond the budget.
segments.translation: 不过，对于有好几个孩子的家庭来说，这里并不是理想的目的地，因为费用可能会超出预算。

segments.text: About the accommodation, you can choose from different types of rooms, and the price differs a lot.
segments.translation: 住宿方面，有多种房型可供选择，价格差异很大。

segments.text: Take the bathing facilities, for example; I booked a room with a spa bath for the first two days, which is the most cost-effective one.
segments.translation: 以洗浴设施为例，头两天我订了一间带水疗浴缸的客房，这是性价比最高的房型。

segments.text: But for the three days left, I changed the room and lived in the one with a private pool.
segments.translation: 但剩下的三天里，我换了房间，住进了带私人泳池的房型。

segments.text: It was my favourite; I have to say.
segments.translation: 不得不说，那是我最喜欢的房型。

segments.text: Every night I could relax in the pool, which is so personal and secluded.
segments.translation: 每天晚上我都可以在泳池里放松，那里非常私密而幽静。

segments.text: And the third option is a room with a private beach, which I want to experience next time.
segments.translation: 第三种选择是带私人海滩的客房，我下次想体验一下。

segments.text: The resort has various facilities catering to the needs of different visitors.
segments.translation: 度假村设有各种设施，可以满足不同游客的需求。

segments.text: There is a golf course, and if you want to play, you can either hire the equipment on the course or buy it in the golf shop.
segments.translation: 那里有一座高尔夫球场。如果想打球，你既可以在球场租用装备，也可以在高尔夫用品商店购买。

segments.text: If you're going to bring some snacks and drinks and relax in the open air, you can go to the picnic area, which was extended recently.
segments.translation: 如果你想带些零食和饮料到户外放松，可以去最近扩建过的野餐区。

segments.text: The good news is that a horse ranch was added to the resort, so you can try horse riding if interested.
segments.translation: 好消息是，度假村新增了一座马场，所以感兴趣的话可以尝试骑马。

segments.text: You can also visit a range of attractions, like the farm, waterfall etc.
segments.translation: 你还可以游览农场、瀑布等一系列景点。

segments.text: I went to the town on the first day to enjoy the local food and talk with the local people.
segments.translation: 第一天我去了镇上，品尝当地美食，还和当地人聊了天。

segments.text: Then, the next day, I joined a tour group to the rainforest.
segments.translation: 第二天，我跟随旅行团去了雨林。

segments.text: It was my first time seeing a rainforest, and I was struck by the thick vegetation and diverse species, so I recommend it to you.
segments.translation: 那是我第一次见到雨林，茂密的植被和丰富的物种令我惊叹不已，所以我推荐大家去看看。

segments.text: If you like, you can even explore the rainforest.
segments.translation: 如果愿意，你甚至可以深入探索雨林。

segments.text: Walking among the densely covered forest, you can find different species of plants and animals.
segments.translation: 行走在植被茂密的森林中，你可以发现各种不同的动植物。

segments.text: It is an exciting activity for both young and old, so all the people who have been there loved it.
segments.translation: 无论老少，这都是一项令人兴奋的活动，所以去过的人都很喜欢。

segments.text: Don't worry; you won't get lost, as a guide will lead you throughout the exploration.
segments.translation: 不用担心，你不会迷路，因为整个探索过程中都会有向导带领。

segments.text: The most popular attraction is called the Sound of the Birds.
segments.translation: 最受欢迎的景点叫作“鸟鸣之声”。

segments.text: It used to be open at weekends, but it was always crowded with people.
segments.translation: 它过去在周末开放，但总是人满为患。

segments.text: As a result, it has changed the schedule and put it on the last two days of the weekdays.
segments.translation: 因此，它调整了开放安排，改到工作日的最后两天开放。

segments.text: I think it will give visitors a better experience.
segments.translation: 我认为这会给游客带来更好的体验。

segments.text: Besides the recreational facilities, I'd also like to introduce you to some other facilities in the resort centre that may be useful.
segments.translation: 除了娱乐设施，我还想介绍一下度假村中心内其他一些可能有用的设施。

segments.text: First, it offers a transfer service.
segments.translation: 首先，这里提供接送服务。

segments.text: You don't have to rent a car or take a taxi when you arrive at the airport.
segments.translation: 抵达机场后，你不必租车或乘坐出租车。

segments.text: A bus will pick you up and take you directly to the resort.
segments.translation: 会有大巴来接你，直接把你送到度假村。

segments.text: It leaves every 24 minutes, and there is no extra charge.
segments.translation: 大巴每24分钟一班，而且不另行收费。

segments.text: For coffee lovers, there is a café in the centre, and it opens from 8 a.m. to 11 p.m.
segments.translation: 对于咖啡爱好者，中心里有一家咖啡馆，营业时间为上午8点至晚上11点。

segments.text: If you want to reserve a guided tour of the attractions, go to the tour booking office, which is located next to the café.
segments.translation: 如果你想预订景点的导览游，可以前往咖啡馆旁边的旅游预订处。

segments.text: However, the tourist shop is being refurbished and isn't open at the moment, so if you want to buy some souvenirs for your families or friends, maybe you have to go to the town.
segments.translation: 不过，旅游纪念品商店正在翻修，目前没有营业。因此，如果你想给家人或朋友买些纪念品，可能得去镇上。

segments.text: The last thing I want to mention is there is an aboriginal tribe near the resort, and if you are interested, there is a visit every Wednesday.
segments.translation: 最后我想提的是，度假村附近有一个原住民部落。如果感兴趣，每周三都有参观活动。

segments.text: Maybe some of you have learnt aboriginal history or aboriginal traditions at school, like traditional dancing and blanket weaving.
segments.translation: 也许有些人在学校学过原住民的历史或传统，比如传统舞蹈和编织毯子。

segments.text: But this time, you can experience by yourselves, appreciating aboriginal rock painting and even talking to well-known painters.
segments.translation: 但这一次，你可以亲自体验，欣赏原住民岩画，甚至与知名画家交谈。

segments.text: What's more, a local herbalist will introduce you to the herbal treatment, which is commonly used in the aboriginal tribe.
segments.translation: 此外，当地的一位草药师还会为你介绍原住民部落中常用的草药疗法。

segments.text: It is an educational visit and I'm sure you will learn much about the Aboriginal tribe.
segments.translation: 这是一次很有教育意义的参观，我相信你会了解到很多有关原住民部落的知识。

segments.text: OK, that's all I want to introduce today.
segments.translation: 好了，今天我要介绍的就是这些。

segments.text: If you want to know more exciting holiday resorts in Australia, please wait for our program next week.
segments.translation: 如果你想了解澳大利亚更多令人心动的度假胜地，请期待我们下周的节目。

segments.text: Bye!
segments.translation: 再见！
